subcodes.first_line: O thou wanderer of mountains and deserts in the path of the Most Glorious Beauty and herald of the Covenant and Testament! Thy letter of the ninth of Muharram 1340 was received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آواره کوه و صحرا در سبیل جمال ابهی و منادی عهد و میثاق نامه ۹ محرم ۱۳۴۰
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @review of publications, @growth of the Cause
